item.title: 5.16]鍊金術成功？50年前的蘇聯衛星墜落！免開刀也能放入植入物？細菌也缺電？黑猩猩也會打節拍！【泛科學新聞】
item.itunes:title: 5.16]鍊金術成功？50年前的蘇聯衛星墜落！免開刀也能放入植入物？細菌也缺電？黑猩猩也會打節拍！【泛科學新聞】
item.itunes:author: PanSci 泛科學
item.content:encoded:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=k7H9CuAUvHg
Corrections:
03:02 經查，Candidatus Electrothrix yaqonensis是在美國俄勒岡州Yaquina 灣發現的，環境也是在潮間帶的泥灘中，不是高溫地熱區。感謝泛糰指正！

看直播抽黃仁勳親簽的 NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5090！

✨ 泛科學 x NVIDIA 線上 Watch Party！
✔️ 5 月 19 日 週一上午 10:30 泛科學YouTube直播
✔️ 超狂抽獎好禮：NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5090 🎉還有黃仁勳親筆簽名唷
✔️ 抽獎活動將於直播線上公開執行！記得揪好友一起看直播，越早進來聊天室，越有機會被點名互動、參與抽獎唷～

// 本週新聞 //
Chimpanzee drumming shows rhythmicity and subspecies variation
https://www.cell.com/current-biology/fulltext/S0960-9822(25)00448-8
Imaging-guided deep tissue in vivo sound printing
https://www.science.org/doi/10.1126/science.adt0293
Soviet spacecraft Kosmos 482 crashes back to Earth, disappearing into Indian Ocean after 53 years in orbit
https://www.livescience.com/space/space-exploration/soviet-spacecraft-kosmos-482-crashes-back-to-earth-disappearing-into-indian-ocean-after-53-years-in-orbit?utm_source=chatgpt.com
A novel cable bacteria species with a distinct morphology and genomic potential
https://journals.asm.org/doi/10.1128/aem.02502-24
Proton emission in ultraperipheral Pb-Pb collisions at √𝑠𝑁⁢𝑁=5.02 TeV
https://journals.aps.org/prc/abstract/10.1103/PhysRevC.111.054906
Design principles of cell-state-specific enhancers in hematopoiesis
https://www.cell.com/cell/fulltext/S0092-8674(25)00449-0

https://www.science.org/content/article/chimpanzee-drumming-may-give-clues-roots-rhythm

https://www.wired.com/story/scientists-have-just-discovered-a-new-type-of-electricity-conducting-bacteria
https://www.sciencealert.com/scientists-witness-lead-literally-turn-into-gold-in-the-large-hadron-collider
https://home.cern/news/news/physics/alice-detects-conversion-lead-gold-lhc
https://phys.org/news/2025-05-ai-dna-genes-healthy-mammalian.html

item.title: 5.16]美元貶值→半導體產業完蛋？日本半導體產業為何一夕之間失落了？美國最狠的可不只有《廣場協議》！

item.content:encoded:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2gSXYQMlILQ
#山立樹 #超能維他命C
全新長效型維他命C
https://www.shanlishu.com/zh-TW/products/ms001zt030a
✔️美國全新技術『植物脂質代謝物』幫助高吸收
✔️1000mg 植萃維他命C，長期食用安心
✔️200mg 柑橘類黃酮，協同維他命C吸收

item.title: 5.8]怕起火就換固態電池！鋰電池起火＝失控，有撲滅方法嗎？電動車真的安全嗎？
item.itunes:title: 5.8]怕起火就換固態電池！鋰電池起火＝失控，有撲滅方法嗎？電動車真的安全嗎？
item.itunes:author: PanSci 泛科學
item.content:encoded:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pEaRL0eKtUc
https://www.shanlishu.com/zh-TW/products/ms003zt030a
非化學B群，選用蕎麥與藜麥，萃取天然B群
兩款頂級穀物，讓B群結構更完整，吸收率更高

選擇貼近天然又高效的B群
首選山立樹超感維他命B群

#山立樹 #超感維他命B群"

// 延伸閱讀 //

https://pansci.asia/archives/151168
